---
title: "shinyexample"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{shinyexample}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

# Locally Run Caulobrowser App
```{r setup}
library(caulobrowser)
Sys.setenv(
  "CAULOBROWSER_DB_PATH" = "/Users/baldikacti/webapp-dev/caulobrowser/caulobrowser.duckdb"
)
caulobrowser::run_app()
```
